---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability for wsp or AWaC
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem are you solving

Describe the underlying problem first, not the proposed solution. What workflow are you trying to support? What blocks you today?

## Proposed approach

A description of what you'd like to see. CLI shape, schema change, new stack convention, etc.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about? Why this one?

## Scope

- [ ] CLI command or flag
- [ ] Schema (`workspace/1`, `awac/1`, `lock/1`, `deploy/1`, `devvault/1`)
- [ ] Stack content (rules, skills, workflows, templates)
- [ ] Documentation / examples
- [ ] Other:

## Additional context

Links to related issues, PRs, or discussions.
